steps.title: Apply the no-NPK limit
steps.content: The farmers have no access to inorganic additives, so any treatment using NPK fertilizer must be ruled out. The comparison should stay with available non-NPK treatments.

steps.title: Use the strongest result
steps.content: Among the available non-NPK options, the table indicates that biochar alone produces the greatest increase in fruit weight and fruit size. Compost alone and biochar with compost do not show as large an improvement. The answer is C.
